reviews.originalComment:
Saya sudah selalu untuk menginap disini. Harga wajar, kamar luas, bersih, makanan enak.
Hanya saja kamar double bed tidak city view. Tetapi kamar twin bisa di request digabungkan bednya. 
Terimakasih.
reviews.reviewComments: I have always stayed here. The price is reasonable, the rooms are spacious and clean, and the food is great. However, the double bed room does not have a city view. But the twin room can be requested to have the beds joined together. Thank you.

reviews.reviewTitle: nice and clean hotel with good location and shuttle to the mosque
reviews.reviewPositives:
good breakfast and food taste
location near the center
reviews.reviewNegatives: very small towel

reviews.originalComment: Sangat rekomen karna lokasinya dekat dng pusat perbelanjaan suzuya, disamping ada warung kopi serta berada di pusat kota banda. Breakfast walau tidak banyak variasi tp masakannya enak. Kamar bersih dan wangi serta desain modern. Warna corak interior jg menyenangkan utk spot foto
reviews.reviewComments: Highly recommend because the location is close to the Suzuya shopping center, next to a coffee shop, and is in the city center of Banda. The breakfast, although not having a lot of variety, is delicious. The rooms are clean and fragrant, and the design is modern. The color pattern of the interior is also pleasing for photo spots.

reviews.reviewPositives: the location
reviews.reviewNegatives: The water supply was not so clean.

reviews.originalComment: kamarnya bersih, lokasinya stratergis, sarapannya juga enak. kalau malam lapar mudah akses ke warung warung makan.
reviews.reviewComments: The room is clean, the location is strategic, and the breakfast is good. If you're hungry at night, it's easy to access food stalls.

reviews.reviewTitle: Comfortable, clean rooms with a convenient location
reviews.reviewPositives: Clean, colorful room and convenient location -- near grand mosque, pasar Aceh, Aceh museum, corner coffee shop, and supermarket.  During a 4 night stay the Indonesian breakfast varied with no one dish repeated.  However, skip the weak coffee-- quite disappointing in a coffee growing area.
reviews.reviewNegatives: Only the "city view" rooms had windows.

reviews.originalComment:
Mudah ditemukan.
Hotel seperti ruko, minimalis. Simpel ga aneh2. Cukup untuk kebutuhan tidur dan mandi.
reviews.reviewComments: Easily found. Hotels like shop houses, minimalist. Simple, not unusual. Sufficient for sleep and shower needs.

reviews.reviewTitle: Great value for money, excellent. Maybe pick a larger room (with a window) when with 2 people.
reviews.reviewPositives: Great location, nice place
reviews.reviewNegatives: Some rooms are small with no window

reviews.originalComment: Terimakasih utk pelayanan para staf yang baik dan ramah full senyum. Senang dengan kesan pertama kali ke Aceh dgn menginap di hotel ini. Lokasi dekat dengan tempat makanan, belanja oleh-oleh, dll. Maybe masukannya: makanan pagi bisa ditambah snack atau lauk yang lebih tradisional/khas Aceh dan perbanyak sayur. Mksh
reviews.reviewComments: Thank you for the service from the staff who were good and friendly with full smiles. I had a pleasant first impression of Aceh while staying at this hotel. The location is close to places for food, shopping for souvenirs, etc. Perhaps a suggestion: breakfast could include more snacks or dishes that are more traditional/special to Aceh and include more vegetables. Thank you.

reviews.reviewPositives: Central location w eateries & a big supermarket around.
reviews.reviewNegatives: Nothing.

reviews.originalComment:
Saya sudah selalu untuk menginap disini. Harga wajar, kamar luas, bersih, makanan enak.
Hanya saja kamar double bed tidak city view. Tetapi kamar twin bisa di request digabungkan bednya. 
Terimakasih.
reviews.reviewComments: I have always stayed here. The price is reasonable, the rooms are spacious and clean, and the food is great. However, the double bed room does not have a city view. But the twin room can be requested to have the beds joined together. Thank you.

reviews.reviewTitle: nice and clean hotel with good location and shuttle to the mosque
reviews.reviewPositives:
good breakfast and food taste
location near the center
reviews.reviewNegatives: very small towel

reviews.originalComment: Sangat rekomen karna lokasinya dekat dng pusat perbelanjaan suzuya, disamping ada warung kopi serta berada di pusat kota banda. Breakfast walau tidak banyak variasi tp masakannya enak. Kamar bersih dan wangi serta desain modern. Warna corak interior jg menyenangkan utk spot foto
reviews.reviewComments: Highly recommend because the location is close to the Suzuya shopping center, next to a coffee shop, and is in the city center of Banda. The breakfast, although not having a lot of variety, is delicious. The rooms are clean and fragrant, and the design is modern. The color pattern of the interior is also pleasing for photo spots.

reviews.reviewPositives: the location
reviews.reviewNegatives: The water supply was not so clean.

reviews.originalComment: kamarnya bersih, lokasinya stratergis, sarapannya juga enak. kalau malam lapar mudah akses ke warung warung makan.
reviews.reviewComments: The room is clean, the location is strategic, and the breakfast is good. If you're hungry at night, it's easy to access food stalls.

reviews.reviewTitle: Comfortable, clean rooms with a convenient location
reviews.reviewPositives: Clean, colorful room and convenient location -- near grand mosque, pasar Aceh, Aceh museum, corner coffee shop, and supermarket.  During a 4 night stay the Indonesian breakfast varied with no one dish repeated.  However, skip the weak coffee-- quite disappointing in a coffee growing area.
reviews.reviewNegatives: Only the "city view" rooms had windows.

reviews.originalComment:
Mudah ditemukan.
Hotel seperti ruko, minimalis. Simpel ga aneh2. Cukup untuk kebutuhan tidur dan mandi.
reviews.reviewComments: Easily found. Hotels like shop houses, minimalist. Simple, not unusual. Sufficient for sleep and shower needs.

reviews.reviewTitle: Great value for money, excellent. Maybe pick a larger room (with a window) when with 2 people.
reviews.reviewPositives: Great location, nice place
reviews.reviewNegatives: Some rooms are small with no window

reviews.originalComment: Terimakasih utk pelayanan para staf yang baik dan ramah full senyum. Senang dengan kesan pertama kali ke Aceh dgn menginap di hotel ini. Lokasi dekat dengan tempat makanan, belanja oleh-oleh, dll. Maybe masukannya: makanan pagi bisa ditambah snack atau lauk yang lebih tradisional/khas Aceh dan perbanyak sayur. Mksh
reviews.reviewComments: Thank you for the service from the staff who were good and friendly with full smiles. I had a pleasant first impression of Aceh while staying at this hotel. The location is close to places for food, shopping for souvenirs, etc. Perhaps a suggestion: breakfast could include more snacks or dishes that are more traditional/special to Aceh and include more vegetables. Thank you.

reviews.reviewPositives: Central location w eateries & a big supermarket around.
reviews.reviewNegatives: Nothing.

reviews.originalComment: Fasilitas kamarnya sangat bagus seperti sudah memakai TV Android, ada showcase mini untuk menaruh minuman supaya dingin. Kamar mandi dan wc dipisah jadi jika salah satu pasangan sedang sakit perut tidak akan mengganggu pasangannya yang sedang mandi. Dan sangat dekat dengan Suzuya
reviews.reviewComments: The room facilities are very good, with an Android TV and a mini showcase to keep drinks cold. The bathroom and toilet are separate, so if one partner has a stomach ache, it won't disturb the other partner who is bathing. And it is very close to Suzuya.

reviews.reviewPositives: Nice hotel
reviews.reviewNegatives: I wasn’t aware before I arrived that there was no window in my room

reviews.originalComment: Alhambra terbaik dekat ke kota dan cari oleh oleh, makan gampang. Tempat wisata terjangkau
reviews.reviewComments: The best Alhambra close to the city for finding souvenirs and easy dining. Affordable tourist attractions.

reviews.reviewTitle: Recommended value for money choice to stay in banda aceh
reviews.reviewPositives: All
reviews.reviewNegatives: Nothing

reviews.reviewComments: It’s a hotel with good facilities and walking distance to restaurants and souvenir shops. Staff are very friendly. Great food for breakfast. Will definitely repeat if we go to Banda Aceh next time

reviews.reviewTitle: Ok stay for 1 night however cleaniness is to be improved
reviews.reviewPositives:
central location
friendly staff
we were offered early breakfast, which was kind
reviews.reviewNegatives: The room was not clean at all, basically only the bed sheet were changed. Severe improvement is needed there

reviews.originalComment: Klo ke banda aceh memang disini paling nyaman nginap…uda ke 3 kalinya nginap disini…recommended 😍
reviews.reviewComments: This place in Banda Aceh is indeed the most comfortable to stay... this is my 3rd time staying here... recommended 😍

reviews.reviewPositives: Great Location, very friendly, professional and helpful staff, solid breakfast with cornflakes (first time we have seen some in Indonesia!), facilities are very new!
reviews.reviewNegatives:
A little thin-walled.
As some previous comments said, the room had no windows, was fine for us, just good to know.

reviews.reviewComments: Amazing stay! The room was clean and comfortable, and the staff were very friendly and helpful. Great location as well. Highly recommended!

reviews.reviewPositives: Todo
reviews.reviewNegatives: Nada

reviews.reviewTitle: Transit hotel before checking into Weh Island
reviews.reviewComments: We would normally take the 10 am ferry to Weh Island after disembarking from our morning flight from Kuala Lumpur. However, this ferry was temporarily unavailable, so I decided to overnight in Banda Aceh and take the 8 am ferry the next day. We arrived early at Alhambra, around 9 am and I requested if I could check-in early as I was sleep-deprived by then. They managed to provide me a room by 10.30 am. I was truly thankful. The hotel’s interior was clean; room was big and clean. There was even a smart tv in the room. Location-wise, it was perfect with many eateries just within 5-10 minutes walking distance. Souvenir shops were also close by. Breakfast was also fair, nothing to complain for me. I will definitely stay here again in my next visit.

reviews.reviewPositives: Todo limpio y la cama muy cómoda
reviews.reviewNegatives: La habitación aunque tenía ventana, no se podía abrir

reviews.reviewComments: Thank you to the staff who were always so welcoming.  They were also so patient as well could only speak English.  We enjoyed our two night stay. The air conditioned rooms were clean and very comfortable.  There was a nice choice of local options for breakfast.

reviews.reviewPositives: Ubicación, el personal super amable. Lugar limpio y cómodo
reviews.reviewNegatives: Nada

reviews.reviewTitle: The hotel's location is very strategic in the center of Banda Aceh.
reviews.originalTitle: Posisi hotel sangat strategis ditengah kota Banda aceh
reviews.originalComment: Yang paling penting hotel nya bersih, staf nya juga ramah. .
reviews.reviewComments: The most important thing is that the hotel is clean, and the staff is friendly.

reviews.reviewTitle: Personal amable es lo mejor de este hotel
reviews.reviewPositives: El personal es encantador; son todos extremadamente amables.
reviews.reviewNegatives:
La suciedad de la ropa de la cama y de las toallas... literalmente amarillas. Esto ha sido lo peor.
La relación calidad-precio es pésima. 
Ya sabíamos de antemano que la habitación no tenía ventanas, pero es muy muy pequeña y se oye absolutamente todo del pasillo, habitaciones vecinas, ect. Me ha despertado el alarma del vecino a las 5 de la mañana... e yo tengo un sueño bastante profundo :)

reviews.reviewTitle: The best hotel in Banda Aceh
reviews.reviewComments: We are very satisfied staying in hotel Alhambra, near to everything in town and helpful staff .

reviews.reviewTitle: Buena relación calidad y precio, puede ser mejor.
reviews.reviewPositives: Me gustó mucho la amabilidad del personal, la ubicación del hotel cerca de los museos, el desayuno también está bien cada día diferente, hasta nos prepararon omelette, también pudimos ir al mercado caminando, y conocer el ambiente de la ciudad, hay un súper cerca del hotel y un banco a un lado, el restaurante de mariscos a la vuelta. Volveremos.
reviews.reviewNegatives: Las sábanas están manchadas como de agua pero no me gustó, la ventana que da a la calle no se puede abrir, pero por lo menos se ve el ambiente, hay un poco de ruido de afuera pero es normal, el baño ducha está separado del WC, y el lavamanos afuera, es cuestión de adaptación, las toallas están un tanto desgastadas si las cambian sería mejor.

reviews.reviewTitle: A very nice hotel with a strategic location.
reviews.originalTitle: Hotel yang sangat bagus dengan lokasi strategis
reviews.originalComment:
Hotelnya sangat bagus dengan kamar konsep industrial. Lokasinya juga snagat strategis dengan harga yang ditawarkan

Ada free shuttle ke masjid raya, namun mungkin masukannya variasi sarapan berat bisa di tambah
reviews.reviewComments:
The hotel is very nice with an industrial concept room. Its location is also very strategic with the prices offered.

There is a free shuttle to the grand mosque, but maybe a suggestion to add more variety to the heavy breakfast could be considered.

reviews.reviewPositives: El hotel está limpio, es cómodo y tiene una localización inmejorable. El staff de 10. Alojamiento perfecto para una noche de paso por Banda Aceh
reviews.reviewNegatives: Las habitaciones (y el baño) son muy muy pequeñas (por eso que sea estancia de una noche)

reviews.originalComment:
Ok, good.. sedikit ada sisa tisu di flush toilet dan gorden agak debu. Lainnya tdk ada mslh, Staff baik n ramah. 
Dijamin tdk lapar ;)
reviews.reviewComments: Okay, good.. there are a little leftover tissues in the flush toilet and the curtains are a bit dusty. No other issues, staff are nice and friendly. Guaranteed, you won't go hungry ;)

reviews.reviewPositives: Excellent hôtel bien situé, super design, très pratique, très soigné et propre. Personnel super sympa. Très bon déjeuner .
reviews.reviewNegatives: Pas grand chose mais pour une region riche en producteurs de café ils devraient offrir du vrai café dans les chambres au lieu du nescafé chimique. 😄

reviews.reviewComments: A good and clean hotel at the heart of Banda Aceh. Easily accessible to Masjid Raya Baiturrahman and shopping centre.

reviews.reviewPositives: Nous avons aime la propreté du logement, la Clim :), et l’accueil de l’équipe
reviews.reviewNegatives: L’absence de fenêtre si on reste longtemps mais c’était indiqué dans l’annonce

reviews.reviewComments: The place was spotless, the staff went out of their way to be helpful and the breakfast was both lovely and plentiful. All in all if you are staying in Banda Aceh definitely stay there, you won’t be disappointed.

reviews.reviewTitle: Très bon hôtel à Banda Aceh
reviews.reviewPositives:
Très bon hôtel à Banda Aceh 
Il est propre et assez neuf ! 
Le restaurant à l’air très bien également (nous n’avons pas mangé le soir là bas mais le petit-déjeuner était très bon bon surtout le jus de goyave)

reviews.reviewComments: Location is super good. Located in downtown, many restaurants and shopping centers are nearby. Room is clean, facilities work well. Very comfortable to stay in. Staffs are friendly and nice, can communicate in English.

reviews.reviewPositives: Bien situé

reviews.reviewComments: Brand new hotel. Very tasty breakfast (mainly Indonesian style). Clean comfortable room. Very central location

reviews.reviewTitle: Le meilleur hotel de banda aceh
reviews.reviewPositives: Le service, la propreté ,l emplacement
reviews.reviewNegatives: Le petit déjeuner.

reviews.reviewComments: I have no words to describe how great this hotel is. I will definitely stay here again if I return to Banda Aceh. The staff were very helpful, especially when I needed to check in late. The room was very affordable, and it included breakfast. It was quite spacious and came with complete toiletries. The breakfast was okay for me, and the hotel's location is convenient, right in the city.

reviews.reviewTitle: Nuit de transit entre KL et Pulau Weh dans un hôtel confortable
reviews.reviewPositives:
Proximité du terminal ferry.
Possibilité de dîner aux alentours et découvrir 
la spécialité locale, saté de bœuf sauce cacahuète.
reviews.reviewNegatives: Il manque une fenêtre mais on le savait. L’avantage, pas de bruit de la rue.

reviews.reviewComments: Staff is very helpful, polite and professional. Breakfast is delicious; different menu daily. The room service dinner we ordered were also tasty. Complimentary daily  hotel shuttle for subuh prayer at nearby Baiturahman mosque is what attracted me to this hotel plus its very close proximity to the famed Mie Razali and Suzuya Supermarket. There are many eatries a few steps away from the hotel. Easy to Grab to Muzium Tsunami.

reviews.reviewPositives:
Personnel super sympa comme partout à Aceh.
Mais la chambre était au delà du sale, le linge est plein de tâche (jaunes, blanches, grises), les serviettes de bains sont jaunes de crasse.
Vaut mieux avoir un sac à viande.
Sinon personnel super chouette et à 25 minutes de l'aéroport.

reviews.reviewComments: The hotel is quite new & located in the middle of the city. The room is clean & staff are friendly. It’s just that the breakfast option is limited.

reviews.reviewTitle: Un bon hôtel et un excellent service
reviews.reviewPositives: Bon confort, literie impeccable, douche et toilettes séparées, personnel très sympa, possibilité de petit déjeuner complet très matinal (6h30)
reviews.reviewNegatives: Un peu bruyant (donne sur un carrefour et musique toute la nuit)

reviews.reviewComments: Although the hotel is bit pricy if compared with the std hotel but its location is very much appreciated. Its within distance with all facilities and best thing is very near and just a walking distance to the great mosque Masjid

reviews.reviewPositives: Im Zentrum gelegen aber nicht laut. Modern und supersauber! Rundherum überaus freundliches Personal (Rezeption, FRÜHSTÜCK 3 Sterne). Zum Fluss (auch zur großen Moschee) ist es nicht weit, wo man gut spazierengehen kann!
reviews.reviewNegatives: Fenster gehen nicht auf!

reviews.reviewComments:
The staff was very friendly and breakfast was nice.
The room was very clean , location was near the Suzuya mall, just walk 100 meters to the Mall.

reviews.reviewPositives: Die Lage des Hotels ist super. Zum Museum kommt man über die Brücke an der Moschee durch den Park locker zu Fuß. Direkt an der gleichen Straße gibt es einen riesiegen Supermarkt mit ATM.

reviews.reviewComments: The location is perfect, in the middle in the city, next to a big super market, near restaurant. While the room is small with no window but is very clean, with good lighting. The toilette is very clean. Hot water is working well.

reviews.reviewPositives: Die Lage und das Personal und das Frühstück
reviews.reviewNegatives: Muffiges Zimmer ohne Fenster

reviews.reviewComments: The reason  I keep going back to this hotel because of the location is handy to eating places  and also the helpful front desk person name Mery, who has a sweet smile. The security staff are always greet  you and ready to assist with all your needs.

reviews.reviewPositives: Gute und zentrale Lage. Sehr freundliches und professionelles Personal. Haben uns sehr wohl gefühlt. Frühstück ist sehr lecker, wenn man kein klassisches europäisches Frühstück erwartet. Wir würden wieder buchen!

reviews.reviewComments: The location is very good, it is in front of the simpang lima and near the baiturrahman mosque, it is in the center of the city. The staff is helpfull and kind. There is not a lot of facilities in the hotel but the room is nice and comfy and clean also.

reviews.reviewTitle: Sehr gutes Hotel im Zentrum Banda Acehs
reviews.reviewPositives:
Von außen denkt man nicht, dass das Hotel so gut in Schuss ist!
Sehr gute Betten, Dusche und Toilette war getrennt. Dusche war sehr gut! 
Das Personal war sehr aufmerksam. Das Fenster unseres Zimmers schloss nicht richtig. Daraufhin wurden uns sofort andere Zimmer angeboten und wir konnten wechseln.
Die Lage ist top, ein großer Supermarkt liegt in 50m und die große Moschee und Restaurants sind fußläufig erreichbar. 
Die Frühstücksauswahl war ausreichend.
Dort ist gleichzeitig ein sehr schönes Café,  dass alles zu guten Preisen anbietet.
reviews.reviewNegatives:
Da die Lage sehr zentral ist, war es etwas lauter. 
Wir haben trotzdem gut geschlafen.

reviews.reviewComments:
The Room was  nice, clean, comportable n modren look with wallpaper but one small thing thoug the room  is too small. Location perfect at center.. Suzuya next to the hotel. 
Overall is oke..

reviews.reviewPositives: Die Lage war zentral, das Personal freundlich und hilfsbereit.

reviews.reviewComments:
jalan kaki ke kedai richeese, suzuya dan masjid baiturahman

breakfast pun sedap, staff sgt mesra

reviews.reviewPositives: Sehr gute Zimmerausstattung. Alles vorhanden. Zentrale Lage, aber auch nicht zu laut trotz der Straße, die davor liegt.
reviews.reviewNegatives: Das Frühstück war für den europäischen Geschmack gar nicht gut.

reviews.reviewComments: Worth for money, complete amenities, Great if you only stay for one night. but it you plan to stay longer, better book one bigger/ or at least with window :)

reviews.reviewTitle: Perfekt für einen Aufenthalt in Banda Aceh!
reviews.reviewPositives: Supersaubere und moderne Zimmer, westlicher Standard mit allen Annehmlichkeiten, wir können das Hotel sehr empfehlen.
reviews.reviewNegatives: Alles war gut!

reviews.reviewComments: I am satisfied with this hotel. The only thing I wish they could improve is I hope they can provide much bigger & better bath towels because the current ones are too small.

reviews.reviewTitle: Perfektes und empfehlenswertes Hotel im Zentrum von Banda Aceh
reviews.reviewPositives: Perfekte Lage mitten im Zentrum von Banda Aceh. Das Zimmer ist sauber, das Bett duftet frisch und ist bequem und die Klimaanlage läuft geräuschlos. Es handelt sich um ein typisches Cityhotel und hat dennoch Charme. Das Personal ist extrem freundlich. Das inkludierte Frühstück war gut. In unmittelbarer Nähe gibt es alles: Restaurants, Supermarkt, ATM, Friseur, Apotheke. Ich war mit meiner Wahl sehr zufrieden und würde ganz sicher wieder kommen.

reviews.reviewComments: Strategic location and cleanliness.

reviews.reviewPositives: Schön und modern eingerichtet. Das Personal war top! Wir haben trotz Ramadan Essen bekommen und konnten nach dem Check-out unsere Koffer problemlos dort deponieren.
reviews.reviewNegatives: Alles gut

reviews.reviewComments: I recommend this hotel for location, cleanlines and bed comfort.

reviews.reviewPositives:
Personal war sehr freundlich und hilfsbereit. Zimmer waren schlicht, aber mit allem ausgestattet was man benötigt. Es war sauber. Wir haben uns sehr wohl gefühlt.
Insgesamt entspricht dir Unterkunft genau dem, was man auf den Bildern sieht.
reviews.reviewNegatives:
Zimmer befand sich scheinbar neben einer Lüftung, zumindest waren nachts lüftungsähnliche Geräusche zu hören. 
Frühstück für Europäer etwas spärlich.

reviews.reviewComments: bagus, di tengah kota walaupun pemandangan kota gak kelihatan tp so war bagus

reviews.reviewPositives: Lage innerhalb des Ortes, indonesisches Frühstück, sehr freundliches Personal
reviews.reviewNegatives: innenliegendes Zimmer - für eine Nacht aber in Ordnung, meiner Meinung nach Preis-Leistung etwas zu teuer

reviews.reviewComments: mantap

reviews.reviewPositives: Das Zimmer war sehr sehr sauber und das Personal super freundlich und konnte außerdem auch sehr gut englisch! Die Lage ist super, man kommt mit Grab schnell zu den Sehenswürdigkeiten und braucht auch nicht zu lange zum Flughafen.
reviews.reviewNegatives: Das Frühstück war leider sehr spärlich, aber ausreichend, und sollte eigentlich von 8 bis 10 sein, allerdings (man muss dazu sagen als wir dort waren war Ramadan, ich weiß nicht ob das damit was zu tun hatte) wurde bereits 8:45 das Buffet abgeräumt. Das Zimmer ist außerdem ziemlich klein.

reviews.reviewComments: they have 3 menu, only

reviews.reviewPositives: Alles top sauber, freundliches Personal, tolle Lage, gutes Preis-Leistungsverhältnis, Frühstück auch gut
reviews.reviewNegatives: Nichts

reviews.reviewComments: Super location, close to mall, city center, and amazing room for its price

reviews.reviewPositives: Gute Lage, gutes Frühstück. Perfekt für einen Zwischenstopp vor Pulau Weh

reviews.reviewComments: Strategic, centre, worth it. Thank you to all staff that very helpfull.

reviews.reviewPositives: La posizione, ottimo materasso
reviews.reviewNegatives: Colazione con poca scelta per chi non vuole non piatti asiatici

reviews.reviewComments: We liked our room, very tasty breakfast

reviews.reviewPositives: Acqua calda, dimensione stanza, box doccia.
reviews.reviewNegatives: Si sentiva il gocciolino dello scarico per tutta la notte.

reviews.reviewComments: Very close to Masjid Baiturrahman and food central

reviews.reviewPositives: Ottima struttura nel centro di Banda Aceh, con servizi da ottimo albergo occidentale.
reviews.reviewNegatives: Nulla

reviews.reviewComments: Very nice hotel

reviews.reviewTitle: Heel erg prima verblijf in het centrum
reviews.reviewPositives: Locatie in het centrum en dichtbij de mooie moskee. Ook een fijne benedenverdieping met balkon om een glaasje vruchtensap te drinken!
reviews.reviewNegatives: We hadden kamers zonder ramen, maar met het oog op al het straatlawaai was dat juist niet erg

reviews.reviewComments: Besar,selesa,bersih,wangi dan staff yg ramah

reviews.reviewPositives: Het Alhambra hotel ligt centraal. De kamers zijn erg schoon en van alle gemakken voorzien. Het ontbijt was prima en het personeel erg vriendelijk. Je kan aan alles zien dat het bijna een nieuw hotel is.

reviews.reviewComments: Besar,selesa,wangi dan staff sangat bagus

reviews.reviewPositives: Geweldige bedden en kussens, heerlijk geslapen. Comfortabele kamer.
reviews.reviewNegatives:
Bij binnenkomst 3 jongens voor de receptie, als ‘portier’ neem ik aan, incheck prima met dame achter receptie en dan een handgebaar ‘daar is de lift’ - en geen aanbod van de jongens om te helpen met zware tas, even mee te lopen, etc. Lekker blijven staan kijken. Geen notie van gastvrijheid. Is deels misschien een cultureel ding, maar is zo eenvoudig te verbeteren door het management.

Idem in te hoog gewaardeerd restaurant. Zeer vriendelijke medewerker ‘s avonds. Maar toch. Diner: uiteindelijk zelf maar menu gepakt en na half uur kunnen bestellen. Kwaliteit eten is goed, maar dus geen gevoel van gastvrijheid.

Ontbijt zwaar overschat, wordt in diverse reviews omschreven als geweldig … misschien was ik er op een slechte dag. Prima hoor, maar niet bijzonder.

Dicht geplakte ramen ivm sharia. Tsja.

reviews.reviewComments: my 3rd times to stay and will keep to choose Alhambra for my trip ahead.

reviews.reviewTitle: Handige locatie als tussenstop (en voor wie Banda Aceh wil bezoeken)
reviews.reviewPositives:
Praktische plek voor ons doel (overnachting tussen twee reisdagen).
Voorzieningen voor dat doel in orde.
reviews.reviewNegatives: Teveel luchtverfrisser (te pregnante lucht), weinig sfeer, en ongastvrij bij het ontbijt (werd opgeruimd terwijl we nog zaten te eten)

reviews.reviewComments: Fair price with great location.

reviews.reviewPositives:
Ruime schone kamer,lekker groot bed,schone badkamer. Snelle inchecken en uitchekken.
Vriendelijk personeel.
Prima hotel
reviews.reviewNegatives: In de badkamer mis ik kapstok of iets om handoek op te hangen.

reviews.reviewComments: Strategic location. Super friendly staff. Nice breakfast. Comfortable room for rest.

reviews.reviewPositives: Ruimte kamers, prestige sfeer, koelkastje, locatie. Vlakbij grote supermark, moskee en pasar.
reviews.reviewNegatives: Ramen kunnen niet open. Kamers zijn goed geïsoleerd maar je hoort het verkeer (voorzijde) wel iets.

reviews.reviewComments: Ok

reviews.reviewPositives: Top personeel gaat tot het uiterste. Goede bedden, prima locatie, goed eten.

reviews.reviewComments: location is good

reviews.reviewPositives: Erg prettige faciliteiten. Personeel was zeer attent. Locatie perfect met loopafstanden tot de moskee en tsunami museum

reviews.reviewComments: Great Hotel

reviews.reviewPositives: Nieuw hotel. Dichtbij druk kruispunt, lokale restaurants en ook fastfood keten van KFC en Pizza hut op loopafstand, dichtbij supermarkt. Kamer was klein maar basale voorzieningen zijn ok. Ontbijt is sober maar adequaat met keuze uit voornamelijk indonesische gerechten.
reviews.reviewNegatives: Geen dubbel glas dus hou rekening met straatgeluiden.

reviews.reviewComments: Good location with breakfast. Walking distance to a few attractions.

reviews.reviewPositives: Fantastische locatie lekker centraal. De kamer was ruim en de bedden waren heerlijk
reviews.reviewNegatives: De straal in de douche is een pis straaltje.

reviews.reviewComments: Food nice, staff nice

reviews.reviewPositives: sarapan sedap
reviews.reviewNegatives: tiada pandangan luar.

reviews.reviewComments: everything was great

reviews.reviewPositives: Hotel area Banda Aceh. Boleh nampak suasan malam Banda Aceh. Bilik selesa, besar ! Worth it. Sarapan pon sedap !

reviews.reviewComments: Fasilitas lengkap, dekat dgn tempat makan, kamar bersih

reviews.reviewTitle: Selesa. Akan stay lagi di sini next time
reviews.reviewPositives: Bilik bersih. Lokasi berdekatan dengan banyak tempat makan dan dikelilingi cafe yang kopinya sedap sekali.
reviews.reviewNegatives: Mungkin boleh buat penambahan menu breakfast

reviews.reviewComments: Sangat aman dan selesa.Bagus  service dan staff nya

reviews.reviewPositives: Bilik yang bersih dan selesa. Ada lif.
reviews.reviewNegatives: Agak sempit tandas. Kurang sesuai jika berkerusi roda. Mungkin ada bilik yang sesuai.

reviews.reviewComments: GOOD

reviews.reviewPositives:
Dekat masjid
Nama Syariah
reviews.reviewNegatives:
Kurang...
Econ kurang sejuk
Sinki tiada
Hot water 
Iron

reviews.reviewComments: nice room and nice staff

reviews.reviewPositives: 员工友善，干净卫生，位置极佳
reviews.reviewNegatives: 房间外噪音有点大

reviews.reviewComments: Hotel is very clean and staff are very polite. Next to coffee shop and restaurants so very easy to find food. Also next to Suzuya department store.

reviews.reviewPositives: Berada di pusat
reviews.reviewNegatives: Tiada

reviews.reviewTitle: Love the coffee and great location too
reviews.reviewComments: I stayed there couple of times for business trip. They have Sanger Coffee which you could enjoy at their small but cozy restaurant. Location is a plus too since it’s a walking distance to Suzuya Market and Tower Coffee.

reviews.reviewPositives: Clean and nice room

reviews.reviewComments: Nice hotel. I like the separated design of toilet and bathroom. The hotel next to Coffee Shop and Supermarket.

reviews.reviewTitle: Good value for money. Room without window OK, but small.
reviews.reviewPositives: Relatively good value for the price. Clean room, nice staff.
reviews.reviewNegatives: I booked a room without window, which was cheaper. What I did not know, that that room is significantly smaller than rooms with window. This should be clearly indicated on the website or maybe even mentioned by the staff at reception.

reviews.reviewComments: Wifi strong, room clean although a bit small (enough space for prayer), and close to Masjid Raya. For the price, this place is a steal!

reviews.reviewPositives: Comfy bed and great shower

reviews.reviewComments: Terbaik

reviews.reviewPositives: The location is in city center.
reviews.reviewNegatives: Breakfast dont have variety of food.

reviews.reviewComments: Clean, strategically located and just right for those looking for no frills accommodation.

reviews.reviewPositives: Clean, quiet,  friendly,  helpful staff . Ok breakfast.
reviews.reviewNegatives: Terrible coffee !

reviews.originalComment: Bersih pelayanan sangat baik dan tempat sangat strategis dekat kemana saja
reviews.reviewComments: Clean service is very good and the location is very strategic close to everywhere.

reviews.reviewTitle: A nice clean friendly functional hotel with no frills, but in a good location.
reviews.reviewPositives: Within the context of Banda Aceh then this hotel is decent enough - a good location near the main sights, right next to a large supermarket, and with friendly staff. The room was clean and functional, without being anything special.
reviews.reviewNegatives: The breakfast was very underwhelming… although they did have bright green slices of bread, which was kinda cool!!!

reviews.originalComment: Dekat kemana2..hotel bersih dan aroma jg wangi
reviews.reviewComments: Close to everything.. the hotel is clean and has a pleasant aroma.

reviews.reviewTitle: Nice surprise on the modern design.
reviews.reviewPositives: Modern, appealing design. Staff very friendly. Breakfast included, common local food, no frills, ok. Good value for the price.

reviews.reviewComments: A very nice experience. Anyone passing through this small city should consider staying at this establishment. Top marks all round from the moment we entered the hotel until we left.

reviews.reviewTitle: Perfect for an overnight in Banda Aceh
reviews.reviewPositives: Convient, clean, kind staff and yummy breakfast!

reviews.reviewComments: Our family had an excellent stay at this hotel in Banda Aceh. The location was perfect, with plenty of shopping options nearby. The staff were friendly and went above and beyond to ensure our comfort. The cleanliness of the property was impeccable, and we appreciated the hot water in the showers. The facilities were great, although the view could have been better. The hotel offered a convenient walkability to various attractions, making it easy for us to explore the city. Overall, we highly recommend this hotel for families looking for a comfortable and enjoyable stay in Banda Aceh

reviews.reviewNegatives: towel too short

reviews.originalComment: Semuanya ok.....ternyata ada staff yang sedaerah....ketika harus brgkt jam 6.30 dan minta sarapan jam 6 pagi,alhamdulilah terbantukan....lokasinya strategis bangetttt.....di seberang pusat oleh2 dan kuliner....pas di samping hotel ada nasi gurih pak rasyid  yg katanya salah satu terkenal di aceh dan mall suzu (klo gak salah)....the best banget deh lokasinya....
reviews.reviewComments: Everything is fine.....it turns out there are staff from the same area....when I had to leave at 6:30 and asked for breakfast at 6 in the morning, thank God I was helped....the location is really strategic.....across from the souvenir and culinary center....next to the hotel is Pak Rasyid's flavorful rice which is said to be one of the famous ones in Aceh and the Suzu mall (if I'm not mistaken)....the location is really the best....

reviews.reviewPositives: The hotel has spacious rooms with nice amenities, friendly staff, and is in a central location.
reviews.reviewNegatives: Cleanliness was ok, but double-checking the bed sheets for stains would have been nice.

reviews.reviewComments: Kind and helpful English-speaking  staff, clean and well equipped room, delicious Indonesian breakfast, nice cafe on the ground floor, convenient location near the mosque, shops and restaurants

reviews.reviewPositives: It was the first confortable bed we had in Aceh! The overall service and breakfast were also very good.

reviews.originalComment:
Kebersihan, pelayanan ok utk sarapan sederhana, jenis cake nya hny 2 macam.
Jenis kamar deluxe twin room kamar terlalu kecil, seharusnya 2 tmp tdr, ternyata 1 tmp tdr. Tidak ada lemari dan ventilasinya. Jk bawa anak yg sudah dewasa 1 orang tempatnya kesempitan. Seperti ruangan anak kost.
reviews.reviewComments: Cleanliness, service is okay for a simple breakfast, there are only 2 types of cake. The deluxe twin room is too small for a room that is supposed to accommodate 2 beds; it actually has 1 bed. There is no wardrobe and ventilation. If you bring an adult child, there is not enough space. It feels like a student dorm room.

reviews.reviewPositives: Most things
reviews.reviewNegatives: The sahoor food was cold.

reviews.reviewComments:
Notre séjour s’est très bien déroulé 
L’hôtel est très propre 
Les murs assez fins
Attention le restaurant charge 20% de frais, il est très bon
Nous recommandons

reviews.reviewTitle: Great stay in a great hotel !
reviews.reviewPositives: Excellent room, excellent staff, great breakfast, just all round a great place to stayin Banda Acah.

reviews.reviewTitle: Very central and very supportive personnel
reviews.reviewComments: We just stayed one Night but were warmly welcomed. Personnel is super friendly and helpful! We plan to come back.

reviews.reviewPositives: good
reviews.reviewNegatives: sarapan tak best

reviews.reviewComments: Sehr gutes Frühstück

reviews.reviewTitle: Good value, good quality in centre of Banda Aceh
reviews.reviewPositives: Excellent location. Everything clean and well run. Good price, good staff.

reviews.reviewComments: Purtroppo abbiamo dormito solo una notte. L'hotel ci ha soddisfatto, lo staff molto gentile. Suggerirei asciugamani per la doccia più grandi. La nostra camera era un po' rumorosa, forse era sopra una cappa di ristorante.

reviews.reviewTitle: Wonderful staff eventually made our stay comfortable.
reviews.reviewPositives: Upgrade to  a cleaner room
reviews.reviewNegatives: Small bedrooms need better ventilation

reviews.reviewComments: Fijn hotel met heel vriendelijk en behulpzaam personeel.goed restaurant met heerlijk eten en een prima ligging!

reviews.reviewTitle: It was very good - lovely modern hotel
reviews.reviewPositives: It’s was very clean and comfortable, the staff super helpful and it was good value for money.
reviews.reviewNegatives: Nothing

reviews.reviewComments: Overalpelayanan hotel sangat baik, apalagi hotel baru tapi fasilitasnya masih terbatas tidak ada kolam renang, tempat gym dan lainnya.lokasi sangat strategis dijalan utama sebelum kearea mesjid raya dan dekat ke mana-mana.gampang cari makanan dan banyak tempat owetamuan.

reviews.reviewTitle: Still new and very good. Friendly staff. The hotel restaurant was nice. I would stay with them again
reviews.reviewPositives: The room was spacious. The included buffet breakfast was better than expected. And I especially appreciate their accommodating my request for early breakfast.

reviews.reviewComments: Hotelnya super nyaman, jangkauan lokasi juga deket kemana-mana, pelayanan staf nya jg ramah sekali. Breakfastnyaa enakk, insya Allah jd recom kalo ke banda aceh lagi

reviews.reviewTitle: Fantastic local hot in a good location.
reviews.reviewPositives:
A nice clean hotel within walking distance from the bait rahman mosque.  Free transportation provided to morning prayers.

Room was cleaned daily with clean towels and bottled water provided.

Shower was strong and hot.

Room was quiet and relaxing. With ample room and a writing desk provided.

Large well provisioned supermarket next door and a 24 hour chemist and a 24 hour convenience store just across the bridge.

Many sightseeing places are within walking distance.
reviews.reviewNegatives:
Restaurants in the area are basic local fare selling Achenese food.

Towels are grade 2 and slightly grey.

reviews.reviewComments: Kebersihan sangat baik, hanya luas kamar sangat kecil. Fasilitas lain seperti kolam renang dll tidak ada.  Pilihan makanan terdekat sebelah kanan KQ5 dan kiri Restoran Padang, selebihnya terpaksa menggunakan jasa ojek online untuk kebutuhan makanan dll.

reviews.reviewTitle: A comfortable place to stay in Banda Aceh.
reviews.reviewPositives: Staff was nice and helpful. Room is comfortable. Location is good.
reviews.reviewNegatives: Nothing.

reviews.reviewComments: 位置很好，房间也干净

reviews.reviewPositives: The beds were comfortable!

reviews.reviewComments: everything is nice

reviews.reviewPositives: Strategic location, helpful and friendly service, free shuttle service to the Masjid for Fajr prayer.
reviews.reviewNegatives: Nothing

reviews.reviewComments: Lokasi hotel ditengah kota…enak kalau kemana2… baik ke pusat oleh-oleh atau makanan…yg utama dekat ke mesjid baiturahman n ada free shuttle bus

reviews.reviewTitle: Very nice hotel with friendly staff
reviews.reviewPositives: All new, clean and quiet. The staff were also very friendly and helpful

reviews.reviewComments:
Kamar bersih dan wangi.
Pesan early breakfast waktu check in (resepsionis sudah mencatat) tp realita waktu hari H tidak ada menu yg tersedia

reviews.reviewTitle: Will not stay at Alhambra again
reviews.reviewPositives: The rooms were too small without windows, no wardrobe to hang clothes (only 2 hangers were provided).
reviews.reviewNegatives: The size of the room.  It was too small.

reviews.reviewComments: Pesan diagoda ada 2 tipe superior, superior tanpa jendela dan superior, saya pilih superior, ttp yg diberikan kamar tanpa jendela, saat minta sajadah kestaf melalui telepon tdk digubris, kamar kecil, sangat tdk direkomendasikan cukup sekali

reviews.reviewPositives: Nice and clean with very friendly staff. Central location. Good restaurant.
reviews.reviewNegatives: Would have been nice to have a bit more desk space in the room but the staff were good in letting us use a table in the restaurant to work.

reviews.reviewComments: Hotel yang bersih dan bagus dengan lokasi yang sangat strategis karena berada di simpang lima kota Banda Aceh. Cuma fasilitas sarapan perlu ditingkatkan lagi. Kami sarapan jam 9 sudah pada habis. Selain itu hotel juga minim fasilitas pendukung lain jadi kurang cocok untuk yang mau staycation.

reviews.reviewTitle: Everything are good (location, staff, food, confortable).
reviews.reviewPositives: Bery good location to stay at Banda Aceh.
reviews.reviewNegatives: No complain

reviews.reviewComments: Kamarnya bersih dan interiornya lumayan bagus, hanya saja menurut saya terlalu kecil untuk hrga 490rb..dan tidak ada jendelanya

reviews.reviewPositives: food is superb

reviews.reviewComments: Room service masuk untuk cleaning saat tamu masih ada di dalam kamar, makanan di resto juga tidak variatif

reviews.reviewTitle: It was overall decent stay but if u are light sleeper might not be the best place to stay
reviews.reviewPositives: Staff is kind and helpful, and room is clean and complete with essential needs
reviews.reviewNegatives: U can hear other rooms noise pretty clear

reviews.reviewComments: Kamar bersih, luas, nyaman, dapat city view

reviews.reviewPositives: The staff is friendly and helpful. Actually I find this hotel amusing since they offer rooms without windows.
reviews.reviewNegatives: Nothing.

reviews.reviewComments: tempan yang nyaman,bersihdan wangi sekali

reviews.reviewTitle: Great place to stay in Banda aceh
reviews.reviewPositives: Central, good breakfast
reviews.reviewNegatives: Couldn’t push beds together

reviews.reviewComments: Terbaik

reviews.reviewTitle: Good properties with bad customer service.
reviews.reviewPositives: I do like the location of the hotel with surrounding amenities.
reviews.reviewNegatives:
The way the staff treats us like a beggar during check out is so disgusting. They forfeited our deposit just because of some tiny water mark on the bedsheet. And the staff lying to us about the daily bedsheet changing but being caught red-handed not changing it at all during our 3D2N stay. 

They told us to pay 150000 rupiah for the cleaning of the bedsheet with some watermarks on it. They insist that the condition of the towel and bedsheet must be the same before and after stay without any spots. Not going to repeat this hotel again.

reviews.reviewComments: Mantap

reviews.reviewTitle: Nice Hotel - Friebdly Staff in the Center of Banda Aceh
reviews.reviewPositives: Friendly Staff - nice and clean rooms

reviews.reviewComments: Letak sangat strategis

reviews.reviewPositives: Clean and the breakfast included in the price was really good with tasty Indonesian dishes
reviews.reviewNegatives: Nothing

reviews.reviewComments: Kamar bersih

reviews.reviewPositives: Location
reviews.reviewNegatives: Small rooms

reviews.reviewComments: Sarapanya enak .kamar bersih

reviews.reviewPositives: Comfortable, okay

reviews.reviewComments: Rapi

reviews.reviewPositives: The dinner at  restaurant
reviews.reviewNegatives:
Breakfast for western food really bad.
Lots of noises outside the room

reviews.reviewComments: Terbaik

reviews.reviewTitle: It was nice & clean one-night stay. The hotel is surrounded by coffee shop, and it's all I need!
reviews.reviewPositives: the staffs were friendly and helpful, the room is clean and not stingy, the toilet also very clean and tissue is provided. The cutlery and goblets are clean and quite complete. the bed is nice with two great pillows. What I love the most is the SMART TV. Very Cool!!!
reviews.reviewNegatives: I stayed in superior room so it is a bit narrow for longer stay. Fortunately, I only stayed one night. The noise from outside is a bit loud, but thanks to my super ability to ignore it :) but for those who are sensitive to voice while sleeping, this could be annoying.

reviews.reviewComments: penginapan di tengah kota kemana2 terjangkau,bersih staf ramah

reviews.reviewPositives: Location
reviews.reviewNegatives: Cleaning

reviews.reviewComments: Kekurangannya dinding kamar tipis saya bisa dengar suara tamu dari kamar lain dengan jelas

reviews.reviewPositives: Centrally located in very close proximity to key tourists attractions, and also a great supermarket and nice coffee shop in the lobby area. Staff very friendly and professional spoke good English. Room was spacious and clean, good wifi signal. Fridge, kettle large TV! Would expect this however for cost of room as was a little more on the expensive side than others we have stayed in during our 3 week travels in Sumatra.
reviews.reviewNegatives: No hanging space - need to fit a rail of something to store clothes.

reviews.reviewComments: Karyawan / Staff sangat ramah

reviews.reviewTitle: Nice hotel, great location with very friendly & helpful staff.
reviews.reviewPositives:
Well managed new hotel at a central location in Banda Aceh town.
I was very happy with an upgrade to a room with windows without extra charges.
Excellent beds and seperated shower/toilet, nice small fridge, good working WiFi.
All staff are very friendly and helpfull.
Breakfast is good and tasty.
reviews.reviewNegatives: Beware that the Superior Double rooms are small and have no windows!

reviews.reviewComments: Kamarnya bagus.. rapi.. bersih..  lokasi dekat kemana2..

reviews.reviewPositives: Friendly staff. We upgraded our room for a good price since our previous room have no window. Good location near to Masjid Baiturrahman and they offer transport to mosque for Subuh and Teraweh since we stay during Ramadan. Sahur/breakfast are included. Near to Suzuya Mall and restaurant. Everything was good and we enjoyed our stay here.

reviews.reviewComments: Pelayanan puas tapi kamarnya kecil

reviews.reviewTitle: Nice hotel - can recommend for a short stay
reviews.reviewPositives: Very new hotel, friendly staff. The double room was very spacious
reviews.reviewNegatives: The single room was quite small and didn’t have any window

reviews.reviewComments: Hotel yg nyaman

reviews.reviewPositives: The location is great - there's a big supermarket just 2 minutes walk from the hotel, and there's my favorite restaurant (KQ5) just beside the hotel building. The hotel also offer the transport if you would like to go for subuh prayer at the grand mosque.
reviews.reviewNegatives: The variety for breakfast is limited.

reviews.reviewComments: satpam / resepsionis atas nama khaisar tidak ramah dan menantang pengunjung, selama nginap di hotel baru sekali jumpa resepsionis angkuh dan sok paten kek biawak itu, tolong pihak hotel segera evaluasi si biawak itu

reviews.reviewTitle: It is a strategic place to stay and a new clean hotel
reviews.reviewPositives: Near town
reviews.reviewNegatives: Nothing

reviews.reviewComments: Hotel bersih, lokasi sangat strategis

reviews.reviewTitle: Good stay but facilities could be better for the price
reviews.reviewPositives: Great location, comfortable bed and clean room
reviews.reviewNegatives: Toilet and bathroom separated, no wardrobe to hang clothes nor any place to keep suitcase open

reviews.reviewComments: Kamar bersih, sesuai dengan harganya, lokasi tengah kota,

reviews.reviewTitle: Oke for budged hotel, location very favourable
reviews.reviewPositives: The room little bit small
reviews.reviewNegatives: Location

reviews.reviewComments: hotel nyaman

reviews.reviewNegatives: We had a flight cancellation (as it happens all the time on Indonesia) and tried to switch out booking to another date. First they said it’s no problem to do so, but after that first message they just did not reply anymore. Not to us, nor to booking.com customer support.

reviews.reviewComments: posisi di tengah kota

reviews.reviewTitle: Comfortable and happy with the stay
reviews.reviewPositives: The location is very good. Easily find food nearby. There is also a supermarket beside the hotel. The room is very clean and the staffs are very friendly. They even prepared early breakfast for us as we got an early flight to catch. Thank you.

reviews.reviewTitle: Hotel bersih, modern desain di tengah kota
reviews.reviewComments: Hotel dengan kamar yang sangat nyaman, kamar mandi dan toilet terpisah, wifi dan layanan tv kabel lancar. Hanya saja mungkin bisa ditambahkan hair dryer di kamar.

reviews.reviewPositives: Walking distance to shops and restaurants

reviews.reviewComments: Recommended

reviews.reviewTitle: I am recommending this place, everything was great
reviews.reviewPositives: Cleanliness and comfort

reviews.reviewComments: Recommended

reviews.reviewTitle: Short stopover but extremely memorable thank you x
reviews.reviewPositives:
The staff were amazing and were extremely helpful and friendly.
The food was delicious and always served with a smile.
The best iced lemon tea we have ever tasted!
reviews.reviewNegatives: Nothing

reviews.reviewComments: Semuanya memuaskan.. terimakasih

reviews.reviewTitle: Great Hotel Great Food Great Location
reviews.reviewPositives: this is new hotel. just around bundaran simpang lima & just walking away from pasar aceh plus just walking distance from masjid raya baiturrahman. great location. no worried about hungry bcoz there's a coffee shop at hotel with nice & comfy enviroment. restaurant nasi padang & soho coffee shop just around your door. this is 1st time i found a hotel that separate the toilet & bathroom. good effort. i surely will stay here when i come to banda aceh. keepit up guys!!!

reviews.reviewComments: Keren , mksh al hambra
luar biasa
Lokasi hotel sangat strategis
Lokasi hotel sangat strategis
Kamar nya luas dan bersih. Lokasi nya di tengah kota banda aceh
Bfast with less menu

Cozy hotel. Had the deluxe room. Spacious. Shower and toilet are separated. No view from the windows as they made the windows opaque in line with the city's laws. Breakfast is good. Strategic location to buy souvenirs, mosque etc.
